name: Mazanderani
notes: Mazanderani (مازِرونی) — Northwestern Iranian (Caspian) language of northern Iran. Written in the Perso-Arabic (Arabic) script, with the Persian alphabet extended for Mazanderani vowels. GRAPHEME INVENTORY NOT YET SPECIFIED: as an abjad, short vowels are normally unwritten (optional harakat aside), so grapheme→phoneme conversion requires a lexicon or vowel-restoration model rather than a letter table. INPUT CONTRACT: input is expected in the Perso-Arabic Mazanderani orthography.
